events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info for smoke detector spacing/placement rough-complete commercial project per NFPA 72. Scenario lacks actual measurements/room details. We cannot determine compliance without specifics. So decision likely needs_more_info. But instructions: If work dangerous or non-compliant, decision must fail. We don't know if non-compliant. Need produce JSON with fields. Need include rationale: cannot verify spacing/location without dimensions, ceiling type, detector specs, etc. Risk maybe medium because fire alarm placement affects life safety. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 70? value 0. confidence low. references NFPA 72 (e.g., 17.7.3 spacing, 17.7.4 location). Need ensure valid JSON.
